mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `doctor` WHERE 1=1 AND hospital_name in
#{hospitalName.hospitalName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (doctor_name, doctor_sex, hospital_name, offices_name, doctor_img, doctor_title, teach_title, doctor_administrative, doctor_degree, doctor_forte, doctor_about) VALUES (#{doctorName}, #{doctorSex}, #{hospitalName}, #{officesName}, #{doctorImg}, #{doctorTitle}, #{teachTitle}, #{doctorAdministrative}, #{doctorDegree}, #{doctorForte}, #{doctorAbout})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor SET doctor_name = #{doctorName}, doctor_sex = #{doctorSex}, hospital_name = #{hospitalName}, offices_name = #{officesName}, doctor_img = #{doctorImg}, doctor_title = #{doctorTitle}, teach_title = #{teachTitle}, doctor_administrative = #{doctorAdministrative}, doctor_degree = #{doctorDegree}, doctor_forte = #{doctorForte}, doctor_about = #{doctorAbout} WHERE id = #{id}
